rows.label: qev041409_MSG0001
rows.name:
Welcome to the Dopang Caravan, mo.
There is nothing here, but please take your time and relax, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041409_SEL0011
rows.name: Explain the request received from Ngogo.

rows.label: qev041409_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask what this caravan does for a living.

rows.label: qev041409_MSG0002
rows.name: Unlike other Nopon, we do not really like competition and things like that, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041409_MSG0003
rows.name: That is why we live modestly by selling the materials we gather around here, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041409_MSG0004
rows.name: Other than that, we just get excited when we find mysterious things, mo. It is fun, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041409_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hmm, hmm, I see... Understood, mo!
I will write up a contract for you, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041409_MSG0010
rows.name: When the time comes, we will launch a huge firework and cheer up the Elder, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041409_MSG0012
rows.name: We are all going to launch an amazing firework, so please look forward to it, mo![ST:wait ]
